content.problemStatement:
Civil war is brewing in the kingdom of NaturalLand again, and this time, the rebels have adopted guerilla warfare. There are NNN rebel soldiers and they are represented by the numbers Rebel1,Rebel2,ŌĆ”,RebelNRebel_1, Rebel_2, \ldots, Rebel_NRebel1ŌĆŗ,Rebel2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,RebelNŌĆŗ. The king has deployed his soldiers in a long defensive wall, and this is represented by two integers: lowerlowerlower and upperupperupper. This means that the King's army contains (upperupperupper - lowerlowerlower +1) soldiers represented by all the numbers between lowerlowerlower and upperupperupper (end points inclusive).

The rebels pick individual soldiers from the King's army and ambush them one by one. A soldier xxx in the King's army will be defeated only if all the NNN numbers Rebel1,Rebel2,ŌĆ”,Rebel_1, Rebel_2, \ldots,Rebel1ŌĆŗ,Rebel2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”, and RebelNRebel_NRebelNŌĆŗ divide xxx without leaving a remainder. Else, xxx will survive.

Your job is to count the number of soldiers in the King's army who will survive at the end.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case will contain NNN, representing the number of soldiers in the rebel army.
The second line of each testcase contains  NNN spaced integers: Rebel1,Rebel2,ŌĆ”,RebelNRebel_1, Rebel_2, \ldots, Rebel_NRebel1ŌĆŗ,Rebel2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,RebelNŌĆŗ.
The third line of each testcase contains the 2 integers representing the range [lower,upper][lower,  upper][lower,upper] of the King's army.


Output Format
For each test case, output the answer in a single line.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The rebels' army contains the soldiers {2,4}\{2,4\}{2,4}. The King's army contains the soldiers {4,5,6,7,8}\{4,5,6,7,8\}{4,5,6,7,8}.
The rebels will be able to kill {4,8}\{4,8\}{4,8} in the King's army as all the members of rebel army can divide {4,8}\{4,8\}{4,8} without leaving a remainder. The other three soldiers, {5,6,7}\{5,6,7\}{5,6,7} will survive, and hence the answer is 3.
